children.text: Act like you don't care about anyone or let them know how you feel ?
What are you waiting for? How long will you wait?

I know what I would like to have someday, but I'm not sitting and waiting for it. If it happens, it happens.  If not, then I'm ok with how my life is right now.  I soooo want it to happen someday though...lol
What is the most thoughtful thing someone has done for you?
Follow people and topics to fill your Home!
